content.description:
A group of checkboxes populated from a code-defined source, for use in app-pages.

The `source` field is JavaScript that returns an array of items. Selections are written to shared page state via `stateKey`.

### Content Fields

- `label` (string) - Group heading label
- `source` (string) - JavaScript that returns an array of items (`api` in scope)
- `labelField` (string, default "name") - Dot-path to the field used as checkbox label (e.g. "name", "content.title")
- `stateKey` (string) - Key to write selected item IDs to in page state
